name: boltffi
desc: A high-performance multi-language bindings generator for Rust, up to 1,000x faster than UniFFI. Ship Rust libraries that feels native to Swift, Kotlin, and more
descFull: A high-performance multi-language bindings generator for Rust, up to 1,000x faster than UniFFI. Ship Rust libraries that feels native to Swift, Kotlin, and more
